username.description: SurveyCTO account username/email, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username. Never logged.

password.description: SurveyCTO password or API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: SurveyCTO API base URL override for tests or proxies. Takes precedence over server_name when both are set.

server_name.description: Bare SurveyCTO server name (no scheme/path), used to derive https://<server_name>.surveycto.com/api/v2 when base_url is unset.

form_id.description: SurveyCTO form ID; required for the submissions stream, which is scoped to a single form.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
